_comment: Content blueprint for the LISRAYA email

content_blueprint.headline: Starting the conversation about your treatment
content_blueprint.rationale: Opens the email with the verbatim topic line
content_blueprint.copy_outline: Starting the conversation about your treatment Lisraya (brepocitinib) is the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
content_blueprint.design_concept: A warm, human handshake of an opening — 'two people, one conversation,' the email's first beat is care, not clinical data. Background is a calm Light Blue band (#E6F0F9) so it reads soft and inviting and won't merge with the White video section that follows; text respects the 24px insets while the photo runs toward the edge. The patient-and-doctor photo (older woman looking up gratefully at her clinician) is the single focal element, housed in the brand Accent Shape with the large radius on top-left + bottom-right (120px) and the near-point 6px on the other diagonal — never a plain rectangle — sitting as a full-width hero plate up top. Beneath it, headline 'Starting the Conversation About Your Treatment' in Nunito Sans ExtraBold, Title Case, Brand Blue #00529b at H1 scale (~28px/36px), left-aligned, with a thin 2px Gold #ffc60a rule tucked beneath the headline echoing the campaign's gold accent. Body line sits below at 16px/24px Nunito Sans Regular, Graphite #212121, establishing 'dermatomyositis (DM)' at first mention with the brand name bolded in Brand Blue only on its focal first instance. The LISRAYA® (brepocitinib) logo lockup — with its signature gold swoosh — anchors the bottom-left as the brand sign-in, small and confident, its yellow swoosh the only warm note pulling the eye from the cool blue photo. Airy and premium with generous 32px top/bottom padding; this section breathes deliberately so the tighter video block below feels like a gear-shift into action.
content_blueprint.section_summary: Letter opener introducing the video topic

visuals.name: Lisraya RGB® 3.png

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: Lisraya is the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis

content_blueprint.headline: How to talk to your doctor about LISRAYA
content_blueprint.rationale: Delivers the verbatim video message and heading
content_blueprint.copy_outline: Watch this video to hear from a doctor about how to start the conversation about Lisraya with your own doctor.
content_blueprint.design_concept: A direct 'press play and listen' moment — the section's whole job is to make one rectangle irresistibly clickable. Background switches to clean White #ffffff (deliberately unlike the Light Blue intro above it so assembled sections don't merge), keeping the eye moving forward. Headline 'How to Talk to Your Doctor About LISRAYA' in Nunito Sans Bold, Title Case, Brand Blue #00529b at H2 scale (~22px/30px), left-aligned with a short 2px Gold #ffc60a rule beneath to tie it to the intro's headline treatment. The deep-blue video thumbnail (Brand Blue field with centered white play-button outline and the explainer-video placeholder label) is the dominant focal element, set full content-width and given uniform 12px rounded corners per the chart/media exception — not the asymmetric accent shape, since it's a media frame — so the play affordance reads instantly and the dark blue plate pops against the white surface. A single line of body copy at 16px/24px Nunito Sans Regular, Graphite #212121, sits directly above or below the thumbnail inviting the watch, with no competing callouts or icons stealing attention. Tighter vertical rhythm than the intro — heading, one line, one big tappable frame — dense and purposeful, a focused exhale-to-action that hands cleanly off to the gradient CTA banner beneath.

icons.name: vid_thumbnail.png
icons.description: [ICON] Blue rectangular play button icon with a white rounded rectangle outline centered inside containing the text "Placeholder for HCP Explainer Video | How to Talk to Your Doctor" in white font, displayed on a solid blue background. Cont

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: Video guides patients on discussing Lisraya with their doctor

content_blueprint.rationale: Mandatory single CTA, verbatim button label
content_blueprint.design_concept: The email's saturated finale — a full-bleed warm gradient banner that turns up the brand's optimism for the single most important click. Background is the mandated Gradient_callout.png (Sunshine-to-light-gold), applied cover/no-repeat/center across the full 600px with a solid Sunshine #faa31b fallback behind it for Outlook. Headline 'Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help' (or the assigned label) sits horizontally centered in the top third, Brand Blue #00529b, Nunito Sans weight 800 at ~28px, one line — Brand Blue on warm gold for confident contrast, no rule needed here, the gradient itself is the device. The single CTA button is centered in the lower-middle: Deep Blue #003D74 fill, white Nunito Sans 800 18px label 'Visit LISRAYA.com', followed by two non-breaking spaces and a Gold #FFC20E chevron '›' at 24px, sized 248×64px, carrying the signature asymmetric radius 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px exactly as specified — the brand's unmistakable accent-shape DNA scaled down into the button. No images, no secondary links, no clutter — one headline, one button, maximum focus. The most chromatic, energetic block in the whole email by design: after the cool Light Blue intro and clean White video, this warm gold close lands as the emotional and functional payoff.
content_blueprint.section_summary: Single CTA button to brand site
